summary: Possible accessibility barriers found on the IAAP website, including missing alt text, low contrast text, and potential keyboard navigation issues.

ai_suggested_observations.observation: Some images may not have descriptive alt text, which could make it difficult for users to understand the content.
ai_suggested_observations.why_it_may_matter: Users who rely on screen readers or have visual impairments may not be able to understand the content of images without alt text.
ai_suggested_observations.related_deterministic_evidence: Multiple instances of missing alt text were detected in the deterministic findings.

ai_suggested_observations.observation: Some text on the page may have low contrast, which could make it difficult for users to read.
ai_suggested_observations.why_it_may_matter: Users with visual impairments or in low-light environments may struggle to read text with low contrast.
ai_suggested_observations.related_deterministic_evidence: Low contrast text was detected in the deterministic findings.

ai_suggested_observations.observation: The website may have issues with keyboard navigation, including repeated focus on the same element.
ai_suggested_observations.why_it_may_matter: Users who rely on keyboard navigation may experience difficulties or become stuck on certain elements.
ai_suggested_observations.related_deterministic_evidence: Keyboard navigation issues were detected in the deterministic findings.

outreach_notes: We suggest reviewing the website's accessibility features to ensure that all users can navigate and understand the content.
limitations: AI Scout findings are suggestions and need human review.
AI Scout output is not a confirmed accessibility finding.
AI Scout does not determine legal compliance, WCAG compliance, or screen-reader behavior.
AI Scout output is not a needs human review accessibility finding.
